headline: Kroger Scales Flashfood To Mid Atlantic Stores To Shape Investor Narrative
summary: Kroger (NYSE:KR) is expanding its partnership with Flashfood to all 100+ Mid-Atlantic Division stores. The rollout extends a program that discounts groceries nearing their best-before date to cut food waste and lower prices for shoppers. The initiative also introduces virtual nutrition classes that align with Kroger's "Food as Medicine" and community health focus. Kroger operates as one of the largest traditional grocers in the US, and digital tools like Flashfood have become an important...
